NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR SEP-23-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

JUDGE DIANE WICK, CLERK-BETH WILBER: PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WAS PRESENT IN COURT BUT DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY FAILED TO APPEAR. MR. HOFFMAN, DEFENSE COUNSEL, SENT A FAX SAYING HE WOULD NOT BE PRESENT. DUE TO MR. HOFFMAN'S FAILURE TO APPEAR THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE COULD NOT GO FORWARD BUT WILL REMAIN ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR. MR. HOFFMAN ALSO APPARENTLY FAILED TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING FOR A STIPULATION MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL, WHICH JUDGE QUIDACHAY DENIED. BASED ON HIS FAILURE TO APPEAR THE COURT RECOMMENDS THAT ANY NEW MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL BE DENIED AS WELL. REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-26-2002 -
